violations.text: Sour cream was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Sour cream and other foods in bottom of unit were moved to other refrigeration during time of inspection. Ambient of bottom unit was observed at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Top rail of unit was 36 degrees Fahrenheit. Bottom of unit was taken out of service to hold foods that require refrigeration for food safety. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025
Area surrounding walk-in freezer door was observed with an accumulation of ice; gasket appeared to be misaligned. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off at the time of inspection. Ice machine is to be cleaned and sanitized before using again. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024
The hand washing sink, and the food prep sink were observed leaking. Establishment is to repair leaks. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024
